title.v: khóa số liệu theo chứng từ

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Người dùng %s1 và chứng từ %s2 đã có trong danh sách khóa sổ.' else N'The user %s1 and voucher %s2 is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Người dùng %s1 và chứng từ %s2 đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The user %s1 and voucher %s2 has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

#IF @@action = 'Edit' #THEN declare @nsd varchar(30), @comment nvarchar(511), @isUser tinyint select @isUser = user_yn, @nsd = name, @comment = case when @@language = 'V' then comment else comment2 end from vsysuserinfo where id = @user_id select rtrim(@nsd) as name, rtrim(@comment) as comment%l, @isUser as user_yn return #END

declare @name nvarchar(1023) select @name = name from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where id = @user_id if exists(select 1 from @@table where user_id = @user_id and ma_ct = @ma_ct) begin select 'name' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@name)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_ct)) as message return end

if @$user_yn = 1 exec @@sysDatabaseName..FastBusiness$System$UpdateVoucherLockedDate @$name, @ma_ct, @@appDatabaseName else begin declare @user_name varchar(30), @user_lst varchar(4000), @i int select @user_lst = ltrim(rtrim(user_lst)) from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where id = @user_id set @i = 0 while @i < dbo.ff_GetWordCount(@user_lst) begin set @i = @i + 1 set @user_name = ltrim(rtrim(dbo.ff_GetWordNum(@user_lst, @i))) if @user_name <> '' exec @@sysDatabaseName..FastBusiness$System$UpdateVoucherLockedDate @user_name, @ma_ct, @@appDatabaseName end end

if not exists(select 1 from @@table where user_id = $user_id.OldValue and ma_ct = $ma_ct.OldValue) begin declare @oldName nvarchar(64) select @oldName = rtrim(name) from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where id = $user_id.OldValue select 'name' as field, replace(replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s1', @oldName), '%s2', rtrim($ma_ct.OldValue)) as message return end
if @user_id <> $user_id.OldValue or @ma_ct <> $ma_ct.OldValue begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where user_id = @user_id and ma_ct = @ma_ct) begin declare @name nvarchar(1023) select @name = name from vsysuserinfo where id = @user_id select 'name' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@name)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_ct)) as message return end end

if @$user_yn = 1 exec @@sysDatabaseName..FastBusiness$System$UpdateVoucherLockedDate @$name, @ma_ct, @@appDatabaseName else begin declare @user_name varchar(30), @user_lst varchar(4000), @i int -- select @user_lst = ltrim(rtrim(user_lst)) from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where id = $user_id.OldValue set @i = 0 while @i < dbo.ff_GetWordCount(@user_lst) begin set @i = @i + 1 set @user_name = ltrim(rtrim(dbo.ff_GetWordNum(@user_lst, @i))) if @user_name <> '' exec @@sysDatabaseName..FastBusiness$System$UpdateVoucherLockedDate @user_name, @ma_ct, @@appDatabaseName end -- select @user_lst = ltrim(rtrim(user_lst)) from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where id = @user_id set @i = 0 while @i < dbo.ff_GetWordCount(@user_lst) begin set @i = @i + 1 set @user_name = ltrim(rtrim(dbo.ff_GetWordNum(@user_lst, @i))) if @user_name <> '' exec @@sysDatabaseName..FastBusiness$System$UpdateVoucherLockedDate @user_name, @ma_ct, @@appDatabaseName end end

declare @user_yn tinyint, @name char(30) select @user_yn = user_yn, @name = rtrim(name) from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where id = @user_id if @user_yn = 1 exec @@sysDatabaseName..FastBusiness$System$UpdateVoucherLockedDate @name, @ma_ct, @@appDatabaseName else begin declare @user_name varchar(30), @user_lst varchar(4000), @i int select @user_lst = ltrim(rtrim(user_lst)) from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where id = @user_id set @i = 0 while @i < dbo.ff_GetWordCount(@user_lst) begin set @i = @i + 1 set @user_name = ltrim(rtrim(dbo.ff_GetWordNum(@user_lst, @i))) if @user_name <> '' exec @@sysDatabaseName..FastBusiness$System$UpdateVoucherLockedDate @user_name, @ma_ct, @@appDatabaseName end end

action.text: if exists(select 1 from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where name = @name) begin select id, user_yn from @@sysDatabaseName..userinfo2 where name = @name return end
